message:
fix(cli): add robot attachments read path and harden query patterns

- Add sqlite_conn_has_table/sqlite_conn_supports_required_reads helpers
  to generalize schema probing across robot read paths
- Add dedicated robot attachments schema and DB opener so the
  attachments subcommand can open databases with minimal schema
- Switch bench test queries to pre-resolve agent IDs instead of using
  IN subqueries that return NULL under FrankenConnection JOINs
- Replace named column access with positional access in reservation
  navigation to avoid column-name mismatches across schema versions
- Add value_to_micros converter for robust timestamp extraction from
  heterogeneous Value types
- Use PRAGMA table_info for table existence checks instead of
  sqlite_master queries

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
